notes: HAR-319 models the publication/channel root family with runtime-test-backed local staging. Existing live evidence captures top-level publication catalog id/name/cursor shape, and root introspection confirms this root set exists. Empty-state query behavior, publicationCreate/update/delete local staging, no upstream passthrough, and product/collection visibility read-after-write effects are enforced by the integration test because the generic parity runner does not yet chain this publication lifecycle flow.
